about.title: About
about.heading: About
about.description: This service allows regulators to manage their worklist items and organisations to manage their details and enrol in the EPR register.

operatorAccreditation.heading: Apply for accreditation
operatorAccreditation.title: How to apply for accreditation
operatorAccreditation.guidanceBeforeYouApply: Before you apply for accreditation you’ll need to either:
operatorAccreditation.guidanceRegisteredButNoDecision: have applied to register but not yet had a decision from your regulator
operatorAccreditation.guidance12Weeks:
The regulations allow regulators up to 12 weeks to approve your registration and accreditation applications. If these are submitted at the same time, the 12 week determination period will cover both applications.
There are separate charges for applying for registration and accreditation.
operatorAccreditation.guidanceRefusalChargesApply: If your application is refused, you will need to pay the charges again if you reapply.

operatorRegistration.heading: Operator Registration
operatorRegistration.title: Registration
operatorRegistration.registerMustIf: You must register with your regulator if you either:
operatorRegistration.registerExportListInfo: export UK-sourced packaging waste for recycling
operatorRegistration.registerBeforeYou: Before you register, you need to be actively recycling or exporting the packaging waste material you are applying to be registered for.
operatorRegistration.registerOnceYouAre: Once you are registered, you can maintain this for future years by paying an annual charge and keeping your registration details up to date.
operatorRegistration.registerToMaintainRegistration: To maintain each registration you’ll  need to pay an annual charge by 30 September to maintain your active registrations for the next calendar year and keep your registration details up to date.

operatorRegistrationRenewal.heading: Registration Renewal
operatorRegistrationRenewal.title: Renew Your Registration
operatorRegistrationRenewal.registerToMaintainRegistration: To maintain each registration you will need to pay an annual charge.
operatorRegistrationRenewal.registerPayByDate: Pay this charge by 30 September to maintain your active registrations for the next calendar year and keep your registration details up to date.
operatorRegistrationRenewal.registerDataIsCorrect: If the above details are still correct please accept this fees and pay by bank transfer.
